events.text:
>
{"decision": "fail", "risk": "high", "work_stage": "rough-complete", "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"], "percent_complete": 75, "value": 0, "sound_source": "", "confidence": 0.95, "event_time": 0.0, "rate": 0.0, "order": [], "workable": [], "findings": ["Conductor installed with insulation type not rated for wet location", "Insulation rating is incompatible with the environmental conditions of the installation"], "actions": ["Remove and replace conductors with insulation type suitable for wet locations", "Verify new conductor ampacity per NEC Table 310.16", "Confirm environmental conditions and location rating with engineer/inspector before reinstallation"], "rationale": "NEC 310 requires conductors to have insulation suitable for the environmental conditions of the installation, including wet locations. Using the wrong insulation type can lead to insulation breakdown, short circuits, and shock/electrocution hazards. Table 310.16 provides allowable ampacities for properly rated conductors, but the wrong insulation type cannot be used regardless of ampacity.", "references": ["NEC 310", "NEC Table 310.16"]}
